series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains documents and forms pertaining to the application, survey, and certification of clinical laboritories as specified by the Clinical Laboratory Improvement Amendments of 1988 (CLIA); 42 CHR Part 493 and plasmapheresis surveys as required by ORC Chapter 3725 Plasmaphersis Centers. Documentation may include, but is not limited to, the application, correspondence, change of ownership, statement of deficiancies and plan of correction, change requests (name, address, certificate type), proficiency test summaries/reports, personnel qualifications, fees and enforcement. This schedule is applicable to all test categories (waived, moderate, and high complexity) and certificate type (waived, provider performed microscopy, accreditation, and compliance.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: three years following year in which record is created or two survey cycles (four years). expiration of retention period provided there is no pending enforcement action
